title: Emissive Textures
description: With this resource pack you will be able to see in the dark the (minerals, blocks, objects and entities) of minecraft vanilla.
body:
# Emissive Textures

With this resource pack you will be able to see in the dark the (minerals, blocks, objects and entities) of minecraft vanilla.

## Requires:

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

## Optional Shaders:

[Sildur's Vibrant shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/sildurs-vibrant-shaders)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83440ea7b744a0c6822aff49ef071bd540c8d15f.png)



## Textures:
### Emissive Blocks:
- All Ores
- Redstone Rails
- Amethyst
- Beacon
- Brewing Stand
- Cave Vines
- Comparator On
- Repeater On
- Enchanting Table
- End Portal
- Lapis Block
- Redstone Block
- Obsidian
- Raw Copper Block
- Raw Gold Block
- Raw Iron Block
- Respawn Anchor
- All Torchs

### Emissive Entity:
- Allay
- Bee Angry Eyes
- Breeze Eyes
- Cat Eyes
- Ender Chest
- Creeper Armor
- End Crystal
- Ender Dragon
- Enderman
- Fox Eyes
- Ghast
- Illager
- Iron Golem
- Projectiles
- Skeleton Eyes
- Magmacube
- Spiders Eyes
- Glow Squid
- Profession Level Villager
- Warden
- Wither
- Angry wolfs
- Drowned Zombie
- Endermite
- Guardian
- Guardian Elder
- Phantom
- Witch

### Emissive Items:
- Blaze Powder
- Blaze Rod
- Brewing Stand
- Campfire
- Soul Campfire
- Clock
- Compass
- Echo Shard
- End Crystal
- Ender Eye
- Ender Pearl
- Fire Charge
- Glow Berries
- Glow Ink Sac
- Glowstone Dust
- Lantern
- Soul Lantern
- Lava Bucket
- Magma Cream
- Nether Star
- Prismarine Crystals
- Prismarine Shard
- Recovery Compass
- Redstone
- Spectral Arrow
- Spider Eye
- Tipped Arrow Head
- Totem of Undying
